message:
fix(engine): handle array holes, computed object keys, and fallible heap allocation

Lowering pipeline:
- Array literal lowering now emits explicit LoadLiteral{Undefined} for
  holes (None elements) instead of skipping them and under-counting.
  NewArray count uses the full element length so sparse arrays have
  correct .length semantics.
- Object literal lowering now handles computed property keys by
  lowering the key expression when prop.computed is true, and adds
  NumericLiteral stringification for non-computed numeric keys.

GC integration tests:
- ExtensionHeap::allocate() signature changed to return Result;
  update all 30+ call sites from heap.allocate(n) to
  heap.allocate(n).unwrap().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
